creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
<https://www.freebsd.org/portmgr/qa/#qa-between-releases> includes: 

> * a public list of all ports that have at least one file that fails to 
>   fetch from any non-FreeBSD mastersite. For the complete list of results 
>   for all files versus all mastersites, see Emanuel Haupt’s port survey.

– with reference to: 

<https://people.freebsd.org/~ehaupt/distilator/>

– that was discontinued in 2015. 

The last Wayback Machine capture before discontinuation appears to be: 

<https://web.archive.org/web/20141030074538/http://people.freebsd.org/~ehaupt/distilator/>
